name: The Residences at Greenbelt - Makati
description: An ultra-luxury residence in the heart of Makati's premier lifestyle district. Steps away from Greenbelt's high-end boutiques and restaurants, this unit offers panoramic skyline views and bespoke finishes throughout.

name: Avida Towers Verte - BGC
description: A well-appointed studio unit perfect for young professionals working in BGC. Avida Towers Verte offers exceptional value with modern amenities and a prime location near corporate offices and lifestyle hubs.

name: Ayala Alabang Village - Muntinlupa
description: A sprawling family estate in the prestigious Ayala Alabang Village. This meticulously maintained home features tropical landscaping, generous living spaces, and the security of one of Metro Manila's most exclusive gated communities.

name: Rockwell Center - Makati
description: A signature Rockwell Land residence offering the pinnacle of refined urban living. This expansive four-bedroom unit features floor-to-ceiling windows, imported marble finishes, and exclusive access to the Power Plant Mall lifestyle complex.

name: DMCI Homes Zinnia Towers - Quezon City
location: EDSA, North Avenue, Quezon City, Metro Manila
description: A spacious two-bedroom unit by trusted developer DMCI Homes. Located along EDSA North Avenue, this property offers excellent connectivity to Trinoma, SM North EDSA, and major transport hubs at an accessible price point.

name: Ortigas Center Commercial Space - Pasig
location: San Miguel Avenue, Ortigas Center, Pasig, Metro Manila
description: Prime commercial space in the bustling Ortigas Center business district. Ideal for corporate headquarters, co-working spaces, or flagship retail, this bare-shell unit provides maximum layout flexibility with excellent building frontage.

name: SMDC Lush Residences - BGC
location: McKinley Parkway, BGC, Taguig, Metro Manila
description: A stylish two-bedroom condo by SMDC in the heart of BGC. Lush Residences offers resort-inspired amenities with a focus on green living, making it ideal for families seeking urban convenience with a refreshing atmosphere.

name: Valle Verde 5 Townhouse - Pasig
description: A well-maintained townhouse in the family-friendly Valle Verde 5 subdivision. This two-story home sits on a generous lot with a private garden, offering suburban comfort with easy access to Ortigas and C5 business corridors.
